data: {"generalSituation":"Winds will be weak with relatively low visibility over the coast of Guangdong tomorrow. The weather will be hot during the day. Under the influence of upper-air disturbances and an easterly airstream, there will be a few showers over the coast of southern China on Monday and Tuesday. A trough of low pressure is expected to bring unsettled weather to southern China in the middle and latter parts of next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260419","week":"Sunday","forecastWind":"Light winds force 2.","forecastWeather":"Sunny periods and visibility relatively low.
